positive: A whimsical watercolor illustration of a sleeping fox curled up in a patch of glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, surrounded by delicate ferns and soft forest mist. Dreamy, ethereal, cottagecore aesthetic, highly detailed, vibrant pastels, by Beatrix Potter meets Studio Ghibli.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh lines, photorealism
